title: spartina maritima var. glabra
intro: Spartina maritima var. glabra, also known as smooth cordgrass, is a type of coastal grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Spartina maritima var. glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, it was prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
